body_preview: Close the #1 diagnostic gap in the harness: api_key_present:false crashes produce no diagnostic stash. Move state recording init before the API key check and wire stash_diagnostic_error into the missing-key path so that `state why last-failure` and the crash reporter actually capture the reason for the most common failure mode. Why this matters: State eviden
title: Wire crash reporter into API key check and move state init earlier
